---
name: "User Story Template"
about: "Use this template to create new backlog features or Agile user stories for the project."
title: "[Feature ID] - Feature Name"
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

**Description:**  
As a [user type/persona], I want to [goal] so that [benefit].

**Acceptance Criteria:**  
- [ ] Criterion 1  
- [ ] Criterion 2  
- [ ] Criterion 3  

**Definition of Done (DoD):**  
- [ ] Code reviewed and tested  
- [ ] Accessibility verified (keyboard, contrast, alt‑text)  
- [ ] Feature merged into main branch  
- [ ] Linked to GitHub Project board card
